info.name: Mail2Folder
info.summary: Receive emails and save attachments to user folders
info.description:
Mail2Folder connects to an IMAP mailbox and automatically saves email attachments to designated Nextcloud folders. Each user gets a unique email address (e.g. username@in.cloud.example.com) and attachments are stored in their configured target folder.
**Features:** - Automatic IMAP polling via background job - Per-user email addresses via catch-all domain - Configurable target folders per user - Duplicate detection (processed mails are tracked) - File conflict handling (auto-rename) - Admin panel for IMAP server configuration - User panel for personal folder settings
info.author: Karsten Bartkowiak
